name: Mini Sweet Onion Tarts
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cracker crumbs and two-thirds of the butter in a bowl; mix well.
2. Press the crumb mixture onto the bottom and up the sides of mini muffin tins.
3. Heat the remaining butter in a skillet over medium heat.
4. Add the onions and sauté for 10-12 minutes, until tender and beginning to caramelize.
5. Divide the sautéed onions among the muffin cups.
6. In a bowl, combine the milk, eggs, and salt; mix well.
7. Pour the egg mixture over the onions in each muffin cup.
8. Sprinkle the grated cheddar cheese evenly over the top of each muffin cup.
9. Sprinkle with paprika.
10. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 20-25 minutes, or until a skewer inserted into the center comes out clean.
11. Remove from the oven and carefully remove from the muffin tins.
12. Garnish with minced parsley.
13. Serve hot, warm, or at room temperature.
